name: chisel
description: Manage Chisel status, stop a running instance, or launch a Chisel client payload.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

binary_path_or_action.description: Use status, stop, or the local Chisel executable path to package and launch.

pid.description: PID to stop when binary_path_or_action is stop.

server.description: Attacker host:port for Chisel client mode.

reverse.description: Reverse mapping such as R:socks or R:LOCAL_PORT:TARGET_IP:REMOTE_PORT.
